executives.name: Pat Ryan
executives.background: Mr. Ryan is a professional engineer with over 30 years of experience in the mining and automotive industries. He has held various executive positions and has been involved in the development of several mining projects.

executives.name: Peter Manuel
executives.background: Mr. Manuel is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 25 years of experience in financial reporting, corporate finance, and strategic planning. He has served as CFO for several public companies in the resource sector.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Gareth Hatch
executives.background: Dr. Hatch has over 25 years of experience in the rare earth elements and strategic materials sectors. He is a co-founder of Innovation Metals Corp. and has extensive expertise in process technology and market analysis.

executives.name: Mike Schrider
executives.background: Mr. Schrider is a professional engineer with over 30 years of experience in project management, engineering, and construction. He has led the development of complex industrial projects in North America.

board_of_directors.name: Pat Ryan
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Ryan is a professional engineer with over 30 years of experience in the mining and automotive industries. He has held various executive positions and has been involved in the development of several mining projects.

board_of_directors.name: Steven Kay
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Kay has over 40 years of experience in the legal and corporate sectors. He has served as a director and officer of several public companies and has extensive experience in corporate governance and regulatory compliance.

board_of_directors.name: Geoffery Broomhead
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Broomhead has over 30 years of experience in the financial services and investment industries. He has held senior positions in investment banking and has been involved in numerous capital markets transactions.

board_of_directors.name: Jared Lazerson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Lazerson has over 20 years of experience in the resource and technology sectors. He has served as an executive and director of several public companies and has expertise in corporate development and strategic partnerships.
